results.description: THE UNITED STATES MARINE CORPS REQUIRES A SMALL UNMANNED MARITIME VESSEL CAPABLE OF PERSISTENT INTELLIGENCE SURVEILLANCE AND RECONNAISSANCE COLLECTION IN OPEN OCEAN, COASTAL LITTORALS AND INLAND WATERWAYS.
